message.content:
If you want the **best spas in Katy, TX**, the strongest options in the search results are **All Is Well Holistic Spa**, **Wellness Spa Katy**, **Spavia Cinco Ranch**, and **Hand & Stone Katy**.[1][4][5][3]

| Spa | Best for | What stands out | Location / hours |
|---|---|---|---|
| **All Is Well Holistic Spa** | Holistic massage and a calm, peaceful spa experience | Described as a “must-visit,” with a calming atmosphere and welcoming staff[6] | 2001 Katy Blvd, STE I, Katy, TX 77494[6] |
| **Wellness Spa Katy** | Solo, couple, and group massage | Emphasizes a strong medical background and wellness-focused services[4] | 1227 Grand W Blvd, B207, Katy, TX 77449[4] |
| **Spavia Cinco Ranch** | Luxury day spa experience | Promotes resort-like amenities and a high-end experience[5] | 10705 Spring Green Blvd, Suite 600, Katy, TX 77494; Sun 11am–5pm[5] |
| **Hand & Stone Katy** | Convenient massage and facial services | Open 7 days a week, with extended weekday hours[3] | 23541 Westheimer Pkwy 120, Katy, TX 77494; Sun 10am–6pm[3] |

A few other names that appear in broader Katy spa listings are **Head Harmony Spa**, **Spa World Houston**, **Footworks Boutique Spa**, **Loonol Massage**, and **Mimosa Spa**.[1] If you want a **medical spa** specifically, the med-spa directory highlights **Katy Med Tech Spa** as one of the top-rated options based on aggregated Google reviews.[2]

If you want, I can also turn this into a **ranked list by price, luxury, couples massage, or med spa treatments**.
